tagline: Same-Day Appliance Repair Service Near You

hero.headline: Your Appliances Fixed Today, Guaranteed
hero.subheadline: When your fridge stops cooling or your washer floods the floor, you need a pro who answers the phone and shows up fast. We deploy from 10,000+ vetted technicians across 40 states for same-day or next-day repairs on every major brand.

services.label: What We Fix
services.headline: Expert Appliance Repair That<br class="hidden md:block"> Gets Your Home Running Again
services.subtitle: From refrigerators to dishwashers, our factory-trained technicians diagnose and fix every major brand. Most repairs are completed in a single visit so your daily routine stays on track.

cards.title: Refrigerator Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of cooling issues, ice maker problems, and temperature inconsistencies across all makes and models. Same-day service available.

cards.title: Washer Repair
cards.description: Expert washing machine repair for leaks, spin cycle failures, drainage problems, and electrical issues. We get your laundry routine back on track fast.

cards.title: Dryer Repair
cards.description: Heating element replacement, drum issues, ventilation problems, and timer malfunctions for both gas and electric dryers. Done right the first time.

cards.title: Oven & Stove Repair
cards.description: Temperature calibration, igniter replacement, burner repair, and control board diagnostics for all major brands. Cooking again by dinner.

cards.title: Dishwasher Repair
cards.description: Drainage issues, spray arm problems, detergent dispenser malfunctions, and leaks fixed fast to restore your dishwasher to peak performance.

cards.title: Freezer & Microwave Repair
cards.description: From freezer temperature fluctuations and compressor issues to microwave magnetron failures and control panel problems — we handle it all.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Working Appliance

steps.title: Call or Book Online
steps.description: Tell us what's broken. We'll match you with a vetted, insured technician in your area and schedule same-day or next-day service — including weekends.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Fix It
steps.description: Your technician arrives on time with transparent pricing upfront. Most repairs are completed in a single visit with parts on hand — no surprises.

steps.title: Enjoy Peace of Mind
steps.description: Every repair is backed by our 90-day warranty. If something isn't right, we come back and make it right — free. Your satisfaction is non-negotiable.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: America's Most Trusted Appliance Repair Team
about.description: Founded in 2011 to solve a simple problem: finding a repair company that actually answers the phone and shows up when they say they will. Today, we're the largest appliance repair company in the USA with over 1 million jobs completed. Only 1 in 10 technician applicants passes our rigorous screening — so every pro who walks through your door is reliable, insured, and background-checked.

features.title: Background-Checked & Insured
features.description: Every technician passes a comprehensive background check and carries full liability insurance before they ever enter your home.

features.title: Transparent, Upfront Pricing
features.description: You'll know the cost before we start. No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upsells — just honest pricing for honest work.

features.title: 90-Day Repair Warranty
features.description: Every repair is backed by a 90-day warranty. If the fix doesn't hold, we come back and make it right at no extra cost.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprise Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Get an upfront quote before we start. No hidden charges, no upsells — just fair pricing for expert appliance repair.

guarantee.headline: Our 90-Day "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your repair doesn't hold up within 90 days, we come back and fix it again at absolutely no cost. We also guarantee on-time arrivals and upfront pricing on every job. Over 1 million homeowners have trusted us — because we stand behind every single repair.

faqs.question: How fast can you get a technician to my home?
faqs.answer: In most areas, we offer same-day or next-day service, including weekends. Call us and we'll find the earliest available appointment in your area — often within hours.

faqs.question: Do you repair all appliance brands?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our technicians are trained to service all major brands including Whirlpool, Samsung, LG, GE, Maytag, Kenmore, KitchenAid, Bosch, and more. If it's in your home, we can fix it.

faqs.question: Are your technicians background-checked?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every technician passes a rigorous screening process — only 1 in 10 applicants are approved. All are fully insured, background-checked, and held to the highest professional standards.

faqs.question: What does the 90-day warranty cover?
faqs.answer: Our warranty covers both parts and labor for the specific repair performed. If the same issue recurs within 90 days, we come back and fix it at no additional charge.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve residential, commercial, and property management clients. Whether it's a single home refrigerator or a fleet of commercial units, we have the team and capacity to handle it.

testimonials.name: James M.
testimonials.text: Service was incredible! Fast, honest, professional, and friendly. For now, there's no other company I would trust my tenants with. They handle everything reliably.

testimonials.name: Rachel T.
testimonials.text: I've never written a good review before, but this company earned it. They got my washer running and installed my oven — all in under an hour for a very reasonable price.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Great technician who was completely transparent about costs. Fixed my refrigerator's cooling issue on the spot and explained everything clearly. Technical skills and customer service were both top-notch.

contact.headline:
Appliance Acting Up?
Let's Fix It Today.
contact.subtitle: Call now or book online for a fast, no-obligation quote. Same-day service available 7 days a week — because breakdowns don't wait for Monday.
